listings.title: Supplier Quality Manager (Site)
listings.description: Fantastic challenges. Amazing opportunities. GKN Aerospace is reimagining air travel: going further, faster and greener! Fuelled by great people whose expertise and creativity sets the standards in our industry, we’re inspired by the opportunities to innovate and break boundaries. We’re proud to play a part in protecting the world’s democracies. And we’re committed to putting sustainability at the centre of everything we do, opening up and protecting our planet. With over 16,000 employees across 33 manufacturing sites in 12 countries we serve over 90% of the world’s aircraft and engine manufacturers and achieved sales of £3.35 bn.in 2023. There are no limits to where you can take your career. Job Summary To be functionally responsible for all Supplier quality activities, within the Site Procurement organisation. This role requires strong people leadership and resource management skills to deliver against performance objectives focused on continuous improvement, people development and supplier quality performance. Job Responsibilities All Quality Assurance activities within the Procurement Business Assures that the Quality system is adequate and is being applied and adhered to within the business, through the provision of independently gathered evidence by the business. Assures that the certification processes within the business is adequately defined, accurate, credible, robust and consistently applied. Driving Supplier Quality Improvement Plans within the Function to achieve Global Procurement and department targets (i.e. escapes reduction plans and concession (tags) reduction plans) Contact point for partners / internal customer representatives, facilitating / managing customer inspection. Ensuring that competent Manufacturing Engineers accurately convert the customer requirements in to clear supplier instructions. Accuracy of the Quality data set. Acting as a focal point for Quality issues relating to the supply of product. Driving supplier process improvements Developing and deploying performance and process metrics that are consistent across the Global Procurement organisation. Ensure the Health and Safety policies and procedure are adhered to by the Procurement Quality team; Accountable for the management of the people within the Procurement Quality team ensuring that PDP, development plans and succession planning is completed; Ensuring that the people within the Procurement Quality team have the adequate skills to carry out their roles, where skill gaps are identified, putting training and development plans in place to address them. Ensuring adherence to all applicable regulatory, legal, and quality requirements. Job Qualifications We’ll offer you fantastic challenges and amazing opportunities. This is your chance to be part of an organisation that has proven itself to be at the cutting edge of our industry; and is committed to pushing the boundaries even further. And with some of the best training on offer in the industry, who knows how far you can go? A Great Place to work needs a Great Way of Working Everyone is welcome to apply to GKN. We believe that we can only achieve our ambitions through a coming together of diverse minds who enjoy collaborating in an inspirational environment. Through our commitment to diversity, inclusion and belonging and by living our five powerful principles we’ve created a culture where everyone feels welcome to contribute. It’s a culture that won us ‘The Best Workplace Culture Award’. By embracing and celebrating what makes us unique we encourage everyone to bring their full self to work. We’re also committed to providing an accessible recruitment process, so if you require reasonable adjustments at any stage during our recruitment process please get in touch and let us know. We are the place where human dreams, plus human endeavour, shape the future of aerospace innovation and technology. Show more Show less

listings.title: Human Resources Intern
listings.description: Are you eager to build a career in Human Resources and ready to apply your theoretical knowledge in a real business environment? Join our HR team! The CMA CGM Group , a global leader in shipping and logistics, serves more than 420 ports around the world on five continents. Present in 160 countries through its network of more than 400 offices and 750 warehouses, the Group employs more than 155,000 people worldwide, including 4,000 in Marseilles where its head office is located. With its subsidiary CEVA Logistics, a world leader in logistics, and its air freight division CMA CGM AIR CARGO, the CMA CGM Group is continually innovating to offer its customers a complete and increasingly efficient range of new shipping, land, air, and logistics solutions. As a result of expanding our organization, we are looking for a Human Resources Intern to join our fast-growing and challenging organization. Key Responsibilities: Support recruitment and onboarding processes, Assist with CV screening and interview scheduling, Take part in ongoing HR projects, Support internal communication and documentation tasks within the department, Assist with departmental purchases and invoice processing. What We’re Looking For: 3rd or 4th-year university students from relevant departments (Psychology, Business Administration, HR Management, etc.), Good command of English, both verbal and written, Available to work full-time in the summer period at the office in Istanbul, Strong communication skills, Problem-solving and adaptability in a dynamic work environment, Eager to learn. What We Offer: Real hands-on experience in a corporate environment A dynamic and supportive team Breakfast: every Monday morning Transportation (Shuttle) Meal allowance Happy hours Valuable learning and networking opportunities for your future career During the recruitment process, the personal data you provide in your CV is processed for purposes including contacting you, implementing human resources policies and procedures, managing candidate selection and placement processes, conducting reference checks, and ensuring security. For more detailed information about how your data is processed, please refer to our Employee Candidate Privacy Notice. We have zero tolerance for inequality and are deeply committed to fostering Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DE&I) at every level of our organization. As HR and business partners, we actively drive and support initiatives that build a more inclusive and equitable workplace for all. Come along on CMA CGM's adventure! Show more Show less

listings.title: Intern
listings.description: Requisition ID: 36595 Office Country: Türkiye Office City: Istanbul Division: Banking Countries of Operations Contract Type: Intern Contract Length: 06 months Posting End Date: 16/04/2026 Purpose of Job The Intern will support the COP31 coordination team in the preparation and delivery of activities related to the COP31 event to be held in Antalya, Türkiye, in November 2026. The intern will contribute to a range of logistical, operational, and technical tasks required before and during the event, helping ensure the smooth functioning of on-the-ground activities and coordination among stakeholders. The Intern will assist in organising event logistics, coordinating with internal teams and external partners, and providing day-to-day operational support during the preparation phase as well as throughout the conference period. While supporting multiple workstreams across the team’s responsibilities, the intern will also contribute to background research, information management, and technical assistance related to event delivery. The Local Administration Team is responsible for providing operational, logistical, and administrative support for the organisation and delivery of the COP31 conference to be held in Antalya, Türkiye, in November 2026. The team plays a central role in ensuring that the day-to-day administrative functions and on-the-ground coordination required for a large-scale international conference are carried out efficiently and in close collaboration with relevant national authorities, international partners, and conference stakeholders. Under the leadership of the Principal Administration Manager, the team manages a broad range of operational activities that support the planning, preparation, and implementation of COP31. These include coordinating local logistics, managing administrative processes, supporting procurement and vendor coordination, and facilitating communication and coordination between the conference secretariat, government counterparts, service providers, and other participating organisations. The team is also responsible for overseeing routine administrative operations related to the conference preparation and delivery, including documentation management, scheduling and coordination of meetings, logistical arrangements for delegations and events, and providing practical support during the conference period to ensure smooth operations. Working in a fast-paced and dynamic environment, the Local Administration Team supports both planned activities and ad hoc operational needs that arise in the lead-up to and during the conference. The intern will work under the supervision of the Principal Administration Manager and support the team across a variety of daily and ad hoc tasks, contributing to the effective coordination and delivery of COP31-related administrative and logistical activities. Accountabilities & Responsibilities Provide comprehensive administrative and operational support to the team on the ground and to relevant HQ functions to contribute to the smooth planning and delivery of the COP31 event in Antalya, Türkiye. Work closely with both internal colleagues and external stakeholders, including service providers, partner institutions, and conference counterparts, to support coordination and information flow. Assist the team with logistical coordination and day-to-day administrative tasks related to COP31 preparation and implementation, including documentation, scheduling, and meeting coordination. Provide occasional administrative and coordination support to other related project activities and workstreams as required. Support the team with ad hoc tasks and special assignments that arise in the context of conference planning and operations. Assist in monitoring relevant developments, operational updates, and information related to COP31 planning and implementation. Attend internal and external meetings or events when appropriate and provide brief summaries or notes to support team coordination. Contribute to effective communication and coordination across teams by helping track actions, maintain documentation, and support information management processes. Knowledge, Skills, Experience & Qualifications Fluency in English; Excellent writing skills in English and an eye for quality and detail Communication skills – Ability to communicate appropriate, concise and accurate information in verbal and written formats, appropriate to the audience at the time Strong research skills – Ability to research and distill information with speed and efficiency Computer literacy, conversant with Microsoft Office and spread sheet packages. Ability to work independently while also knowing when to seek advice; Ability to operate in a multi-cultural environment with changing priorities. Strong Team player University student or graduates within the last 3 years are suitable. What is it like to work at the EBRD? / About EBRD Our agile and innovative approach is what makes life at the EBRD a unique experience! You will be part of a pioneering and diverse international organisation, and use your talents to make a real difference to people's lives and help shape the future of the regions we invest in. At EBRD, our Values – Inclusiveness, Innovation, Trust, and Responsibility – are at the heart of how we work. We bring these to life through our Workplace Behaviours: listening well and speaking up, collaborating smartly, acting decisively with full commitment, and simplifying to amplify our impact. These principles shape our culture and define our success. We seek individuals who not only share these values but are also committed to embedding them in their daily work, fostering a positive and high-performing environment. The EBRD Environment Provides You With Varied, stimulating and engaging work that gives you an opportunity to interact with a wide range of experts in the financial, political, public and private sectors across the regions we invest in. A working culture that embraces inclusion and celebrates diversity. Our workforce reflects a broad range of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences, bringing fresh ideas, energy, and innovation and enhancing our ability to serve our clients, shareholders, and counterparties effectively. A hybrid workplace that offers flexibility to teams and individuals; that is based on trust, flexibility and connectedness. An environment that places sustainability, equality and digital transformation at the heart of what we do. A workplace that prioritises employee wellbeing and provides a comprehensive suite of competitive benefits. Diversity is one of the Bank’s core values which are at the heart of everything it does. As such, the EBRD seeks to ensure that everyone is treated with respect and given equal opportunities and works in an inclusive environment. The EBRD encourages all qualified candidates who are nationals of the EBRD member countries to apply regardless of their racial, ethnic, religious and cultural background, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, socio-economic background or disability. Please note, that due to the high volume of applications received, we regret to inform you that we are unable to provide detailed feedback to candidates who have not been shortlisted (for further consideration). Show more Show less

listings.title: Customer Service & Logistics Trainee
listings.description: Site Name: Istanbul River Plaza Posted Date: Mar 27 2026 We manufacture and supply reliable, high-quality medicines and vaccines to meet patients’ needs and drive our performance.Our network of 37 medicines and vaccines manufacturing sites delivered 1.7 billion packs of medicines and 409 million vaccine doses in 2024 to help make a positive impact on the health of millions of people. Our supply chain is not just core to our operations; it’s vital to bringing our innovations to patients as quickly, efficiently and effectively as possible. Technology is transforming how we manufacture medicines and vaccines, enabling us to increase the speed, quality and scale of product supply.We need the very best minds and capability to help us on our journey to make more complex products, harnessing the power of smart manufacturing technologies including robotics, digital solutions and artificial intelligence to deliver for patients. Customer Service and Logistics Trainee You will join our Türkiye team as a Customer Service & Logistics Trainee. You will support customer service and supply chain activities, learn operational processes, and work closely with colleagues across functions. We value curiosity, clear communication and a growth mindset. This role offers hands-on learning, coaching, and clear milestones to develop a long-term career while helping GSK unite science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together. Responsibilities: This role will provide YOU the opportunity to lead key activities to progress YOUR career. These responsibilities include some of the following:- Support daily operational requirements. Assist with coordination of inbound and outbound logistics to meet timelines and quality standards. Help maintain accurate inventory and shipment records in our systems. Prepare simple reports and presentations for internal stakeholders. Work with cross-functional teams to resolve routine supply issues and improve processes. Participate in training and development activities, applying feedback to improve performance. Why You? This role is based in Türkiye and is an on-site position. You will join a supportive team that values inclusion, practical learning and clear development paths. You will receive regular coaching and have opportunities to move into more senior roles as you grow. We encourage applicants from all backgrounds. If you need adjustments during recruitment, please contact our Recruitment Team. Basic Qualification We are seeking professionals with the following required skills and qualifications to help us achieve our goals: University students of 3rd or 4th grade, in business, supply chain, logistics, engineering, life sciences or a related field. Proficient Turkish and professional working English. Strong organisational skills and attention to detail. Good communication skills and a collaborative mindset. Basic computer skills, including Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint). Legal right to work in Türkiye. Preferred Qualification If you have the following characteristics, it would be a plus: Internship or practical experience in customer service, logistics, warehouse or supply chain roles. Familiarity with SAP or other ERP systems. Basic knowledge of good manufacturing and storage practices. Experience supporting cross-functional teams or project work.- Training on manual handling or forklift operation. Interest in building a career in pharmaceutical, healthcare or related sectors. How to apply If you are ready to learn, grow and make a meaningful contribution, we want to hear from you. Please submit your CV and a short cover letter explaining why you are interested in this trainee role in Türkiye. We look forward to learning about you and the potential you bring. Why GSK? You will join a team focused on patient outcomes and scientific excellence. You will have development opportunities and access to global expertise. You will work in a supportive environment that values inclusion, respect and open feedback. If you are ready to use your clinical knowledge and relationship skills to make a difference, please apply today. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds. What we offer You will join an organisation that aims to make a real difference to patients. We invest in learning and development to help you grow. You will work with people who value inclusion and diverse perspectives. If you want to build a meaningful career in oncology and help shape better outcomes for patients, we encourage you to apply. GSK is an Equal Opportunity Employer. This ensures that all qualified applicants will receive equal consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, gender identity, and sexual orientation), parental status, national origin, age, disability, genetic information (including family medical history), military service or any basis prohibited under federal, state or local law. Why GSK? Uniting science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together. GSK is a global biopharma company with a purpose to unite science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together. We aim to positively impact the health of 2.5 billion people by the end of the decade, as a successful, growing company where people can thrive. We get ahead of disease by preventing and treating it with innovation in specialty medicines and vaccines. We focus on four therapeutic areas: respiratory, immunology and inflammation; oncology; HIV; and infectious diseases – to impact health at scale. People and patients around the world count on the medicines and vaccines we make, so we’re committed to creating an environment where our people can thrive and focus on what matters most. Our culture of being ambitious for patients, accountable for impact and doing the right thing is the foundation for how, together, we deliver for patients, shareholders and our people. As an Inclusive employer, we encourage you to reach out if you need any adjustments during the recruitment process. Please contact our Recruitment Team at tr.recruitment-adjustments@gsk.com to discuss your needs. Please note should your enquiry not relate to adjustments; we will not be able to support you through these channels GSK is an Equal Opportunity Employer. This ensures that all qualified applicants will receive equal consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, sex (including pregnancy, gender identity, and sexual orientation), parental status, national origin, age, disability, genetic information (including family medical history), military service or any basis prohibited under federal, state or local law. Important notice to Employment businesses/ Agencies GSK does not accept referrals from employment businesses and/or employment agencies in respect of the vacancies posted on this site. All employment businesses/agencies are required to contact GSK's commercial and general procurement/human resources department to obtain prior written authorization before referring any candidates to GSK. The obtaining of prior written authorization is a condition precedent to any agreement (verbal or written) between the employment business/ agency and GSK. In the absence of such written authorization being obtained any actions undertaken by the employment business/agency shall be deemed to have been performed without the consent or contractual agreement of GSK. Please note that if you are a US Licensed Healthcare Professional or Healthcare Professional as defined by the laws of the state issuing your license, GSK may be required to capture and report expenses GSK incurs, on your behalf, in the event you are afforded an interview for employment. listings.title: Supply Chain Process & Control Specialist
listings.description: Supply Chain Process & Control Specialist Our partner in the facilities services sector is seeking a Supply Chain Process & Control Specialist to streamline operations and build a robust internal control framework. With 5-8 years of experience, you will be the architect of standardized processes across the group. Key Responsibilities SAP Optimization: Simplify and re-configure SAP MM processes to ensure maximum efficiency. Internal Controls: Establish critical control points, including approval workflows, Purchase Order (SAS) requirements, and Goods Receipt (GR) compliance. Systems Integration: Coordinate with the IT department to lead system enhancements and automation projects. Standardization: Initiate and manage projects aimed at creating a unified supply chain structure across all group entities. What We Are Looking For Experience: 5-8 years of experience in Supply Chain Excellence, Internal Audit, or Process Design. Technical Expertise: Proficiency in SAP MM is mandatory . Process Design: Proven track record in designing and improving operational workflows. Attention to Detail: A disciplined approach with a strong "internal audit" mindset. Project Management: Ability to coordinate between business units and especially IT teams. Show more Show less

listings.title: Supply Chain Specialist
listings.description: Req ID: 516675 At Alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. From high-speed trains, metros, monorails, and trams, to turnkey systems, services, infrastructure, signalling and digital mobility, we offer our diverse customers the broadest portfolio in the industry. Every day, more than 80 000 colleagues lead the way to greener and smarter mobility worldwide, connecting cities as we reduce carbon and replace cars. Could you be the full-time Supply Chain Specialist in Istanbul we’re looking for? Your future role Take on a new challenge and apply your logistics and supply chain expertise in a new cutting-edge field. You’ll work alongside collaborative and forward-thinking teammates. You’ll play a key role in improving end-to-end logistics flows, ensuring alignment with Quality, Cost, Delivery, Environment, and Health & Safety (QCDE) targets. Day-to-day, you’ll work closely with teams across the business (Material Planning, Project Supply Chain, Warehouse, Procurement, and Manufacturing), optimize processes in our ERP system, and much more. You’ll specifically take care of supporting material planning and logistics activities, but also contribute to supply chain KPIs and drive value-added improvements across the value chain. We’ll look to you for: Supporting material planning activities, including delivery follow-up of purchase orders Arranging transport and customs operations for logistics activities Contributing to key supply chain KPIs, such as on-time delivery (OTD) and inventory monitoring Collaborating with central and regional supply chain teams to identify and implement value-added improvements Designing internal logistics processes and ensuring ERP parameters are accurate Aligning physical and system flows to improve stock accuracy Participating in procurement gate reviews and negotiating project supply chain specifications Reducing logistics costs and optimizing customs and transport operations All About You We value passion and attitude over experience. That’s why we don’t expect you to have every single skill. Instead, we’ve listed some that we think will help you succeed and grow in this role: Degree in International Trade, Marketing & Logistics, Business Administration, or equivalent Experience in a supply chain environment Knowledge of ERP systems, particularly SAP (Warehouse Management and Inventory Management modules) Advanced level of English (written and spoken) Good communication skills and a team-oriented mindset Strategic and methodical vision Problem-solving skills An agile, inclusive, and responsible attitude Things you’ll enjoy Join us on a life-long transformative journey – the rail industry is here to stay, so you can grow and develop new skills and experiences throughout your career. You’ll also: Enjoy stability, challenges, and a long-term career free from monotonous daily routines Work with new security standards for rail signalling Collaborate with transverse teams and supportive colleagues Contribute to innovative projects Utilize our dynamic and inclusive working environment Steer your career in whatever direction you choose across functions and countries Benefit from our investment in your development, through award-winning learning Progress towards roles such as Supply Chain Manager or other leadership opportunities Benefit from a fair and dynamic reward package that recognizes your performance and potential, plus comprehensive and competitive social coverage (life, medical) You don’t need to be a train enthusiast to thrive with us. We guarantee that when you step onto one of our trains with your friends or family, you’ll be proud. If you’re up for the challenge, we’d love to hear from you! Important to note As a global business, we’re an equal-opportunity employer that celebrates diversity across the 63 countries we operate in. We’re committed to creating an inclusive workplace for everyone. Job Type: Experienced Show more Show less

listings.title: Industrial Engineer
listings.description: Do you want beneficial technologies being shaped by your ideas? Whether in the areas of mobility solutions, consumer goods, industrial technology or energy and building technology - with us, you will have the chance to improve quality of life all across the globe. Welcome to Bosch. Job Description Leading/participation to cross functional projects and apply practical project management principles with limited supervision (e.g S-CIP) Technical & Financial feasability (e.g Investments, Cost Saving/Avoidance Projects) Plant wide coordination in specific operational area (e.g IE Review, Efficiency Follow-Up, Vt Update Processes etc.) Definition of improvement actions based on ergocheck results Definition of Vt time by using MTM Analysis for complex processes Driving line balancing activities Design/Propose process flows/solutions, prepare technical documentation for technical implementation with teams/suppliers and review/coordinate process flow (e.g CAPP-SAP communication, Vt Update Systematic, Efficiency Follow-up Systematic, MAE Ordering & Acceptance Process) Moderating PGL Workshops for respective PGL elements Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Industrial Engineering Fluent in English Knowledge of MTM Minimum 3 years of relevant experience Strong cooperation, communication and teamwork skills Strong analytical thinking skills Show more Show less

Genç yeteneklerimizin zorunlu staj süreleri boyunca ve maksimum 30 iş günü süresince eğitim-öğretimlerinde aldıkları teorik bilgileri pekiştirmelerini, teorik olarak edindikleri bilgilerin savunma sanayinde uygulama alanlarını görmelerini ve bunu yaparken de iş hayatını tanımalarını, gerçek mühendislik uygulamalarını yerinde görmelerini sağlayan yaz stajı programıdır. listings.title: Project Engineer
listings.description: We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Project Engineer to manage end-to-end project execution, including planning, analysis, budgeting, procurement, and stakeholder coordination. The role requires ownership of project timelines, cost control, and supplier interactions to ensure successful and efficient delivery. Key Responsibilities · Develop, maintain, and optimize detailed project schedules, including milestones, dependencies, and critical paths · Perform project planning, resource allocation, and capacity management · Conduct technical, operational, and feasibility analyses · Prepare project budgets, cost breakdown structures, and financial forecasts · Monitor and control project costs, ensuring alignment with approved budgets · Manage procurement processes, including supplier sourcing, evaluation, and qualification · Lead supplier negotiations (pricing, lead times, technical compliance, and contractual terms) · Execute purchasing activities such as RFQs, bid analysis, purchase orders, and contract management · Track project progress and ensure adherence to scope, timeline, and cost constraints · Identify risks, develop mitigation plans, and proactively resolve issues · Coordinate cross-functional teams (engineering, operations, finance, logistics) · Prepare regular reports, dashboards, and presentations for stakeholders and senior management · Ensure compliance with internal standards, quality requirements, and relevant regulations Minimum Qualifications • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Industrial, Mechanical, Electrical, or related field) • 2+ years of experience in project engineering, project management, or similar roles • Strong understanding of project planning and scheduling methodologies • Experience with procurement, supplier management, and purchasing processes • Solid knowledge of budgeting, cost control, and financial analysis • Proficiency in MS Office tools (especially Excel and MSProject) • Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills • Effective communication and negotiation capabilities • Ability to manage multiple priorities in a deadline-driven environment Preferred Qualifications • Previous experience as a Project Engineer in defense projects, with hands-on involvement in both software and hardware domains, is a huge plus • PMP or equivalent project management certification • Experience with ERP systems • Familiarity with contract management and commercial terms • Experience in supplier negotiations and strategic sourcing • Knowledge of risk management frameworks and quality assurance processes • Exposure to multidisciplinary or international projects Benefits: · Competitive salary and a comprehensive benefits package, including health insurance and fuel support. · Opportunities for continuous professional growth and skill development. · Engage in a collaborative and innovative work environment. · Enjoy a positive and enriching work environment, situated in a desirable location. Show more Show less

listings.title: Process Engineer - Utilities & Tank Farm (GME) - Relocate to Saudi Arabia Permanent Expat Family Relocation Package
listings.description: Please note that this role is based in Saudi Arabia on a permanent, residential basis. Job Req ID: 17355 Description Aramco energizes the world economy. Aramco occupies a special position in the global energy industry. We are one of the world’s largest producers of hydrocarbon energy and chemicals, with among the lowest Upstream carbon intensities of any major producer. With our significant investment in technology and infrastructure, we strive to maximize the value of the energy we produce for the world along with a commitment to enhance Aramco’s value to society. Headquartered in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and with offices around the world, we combine market discipline with a generations’ spanning view of the future, born of our nine decades experience as responsible stewards of the Kingdom’s vast hydrocarbon resources. This responsibility has driven us to deliver significant societal and economic benefits to not just the Kingdom, but also to a vast number of communities, economies, and countries that rely on the vital and reliable energy that we supply. We are one of the most profitable companies in the world, as well as amongst the top five global companies by market capitalization. Overview We are seeking a Process Engineer with extensive hands-on expertise in Utilities processes to join our Operation Engineering Solutions Department (OESD) under Global Manufacturing (GM) Excellence Organization. OESD's technical team is responsible for providing high-quality, multi-disciplinary support to GM operating facilities (Refineries, NGLF, and petrochemical plants) within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and globally. Your primary is to provide in-depth process engineering and operations expertise to monitor, optimize, and drive performance improvement programs for Utilities, including both remote and on-site technical advisory support and benchmarking of utilities. Key Responsibilities As successful candidate you will be required to perform the following: Conduct regular performance reviews of existing Utilities through key performance indicators (KPIs) representing optimum operability, profitability, reliability, and process safety. Develop and present quarterly benchmarking reports with actionable improvement recommendations. Provide hands-on support in implementing performance improvement initiatives, demonstrating measurable results in closing identified gaps from quarterly benchmarking reports. Lead benchmarking and best practices exchange workshops among Global Manufacturing facilities (wholly-owned and affiliates) and facilitate knowledge sharing and continuous improvement. Deliver on-demand remote and field technical advisory support, including process design, troubleshooting, start-up/shutdown activities, and capacity test runs. Provide detailed service reports for each support activity, highlighting facility needs, actions taken, results, and lessons learned. Collaborate with Global Manufacturing facilities engineers to identify and implement cost optimization or process improvement initiatives, focusing on "low-hanging fruits" that require minimal capital investment, through operational adjustment or design modification. Conduct internal assessments on Utilities using Saudi Aramco engineering standard references and highlight any deviations or better standards applied by affiliates for endorsement to facility management or Saudi Aramco Central Engineering. Act as the overall coordinator for cascading and driving Global Manufacturing and Corporate programs for Utilities in operating facilities, enabling their execution and effective monitoring. Participate in Business Plan development, coordinate with stakeholders for capital investments on assigned Utilities and support techno-economic evaluations. Evaluate and recommend new Utilities technologies, coordinate with Central Engineering to facilitate field deployment. Minimum Requirements You will hold a Bachelor's degree in Chemical Engineering or related specialization. An advanced degree is preferred. You will have a minimum of 15 years of total Utilities unit experience (process engineering and operations) with at least 10 years of hands-on experience in handling refinery’s utilities. You will have experience in water desalination and boilers for steam generation You will be able to optimize various utility systems, with specific examples of performance improvements achieved. You will have in-depth knowledge of major equipment suppliers and package units for Utilities. You will have a proven track record of conducting technical troubleshooting, start-up, shutdown, and capacity test runs for utility systems. You will have strong proficiency in data analysis and visualization tools specific to Utilities performance metrics. You will also have strong management and coordination skills, with experience in stakeholder management. Working environment Our high-performing employees are drawn by the challenging and rewarding professional, technical and industrial opportunities we offer, and are remunerated accordingly. At Aramco, our people work on truly world-scale projects, supported by investment in capital and technology that is second to none. And because, as a global energy company, we are faced with addressing some of the world’s biggest technical, logistical and environmental challenges, we invest heavily in talent development. We have a proud history of educating and training our workforce over many decades. Employees at all levels are encouraged to improve their sector-specific knowledge and competencies through our workforce development programs – one of the largest in the world. Show more Show less

listings.company_name: Frankfurt School of Finance & Management gGmbH
listings.description: Staj İlanları Project Assistant/Intern | Frankfurt School of Finance & Management gGmbH Kurum/Firma: Frankfurt School of Finance & Management gGmbH Pozisyon: Project Assistant/Intern İşveren Web Sitesi : https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/home İlan Bitiş Tarihi: 23.04.2026 About Frankfurt School: The Regional Office of Frankfurt School of Finance and Management Middle East and North Africa (FS MENA) was established in Amman, Jordan in 2015. The Regional Office operates and works with multiple European partners and international development industry targeted at Financial Institutions in the MENA Region. FS MENA is currently looking to grow their team and welcome new enthusiastic individuals. The selected candidate may be based either in Ankara, Türkiye or Amman, Jordan, depending on candidate’s preference. Your role: As Project Assistant, you will support and learn from the project and business development teams while gaining handson exposure to international development and financial sector projects. Responsibilities will include: – Assisting with coordination of meetings, trainings, and basic logistics – Supporting project tracking and internal documentation – Assisting in preparing presentations, short reports, and proposal inputs – Supporting business development research and opportunity mapping – Supporting communication with project stakeholders under team supervision – Providing administrative support to project teams as needed – Supporting English-French translation tasks when required Qualifications: The candidate shall acquire the following: – Bachelor’s degree or currently pursuing a Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, International Development, or a related field – Recent graduates are welcome to apply – Strong written and verbal communication skills in English and French – Strong interest in project management, business development, and international development – Good working knowledge of Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, MS Teams) How to Apply: – Interested candidates are invited to submit their CV and a motivation letter by email, using the subject line: Project Assistant & Business Development Intern to: fsmenahr@int.fs.de – Applications must be received no later than 23 April 2026. – Due to the high volume of applications, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Incomplete applications will not be considered. – Please note: Applications that include CVs or motivation letters generated fully or partially using artificial intelligence (AI) tools will not be considered. TO APPLY: fsmenahr@int.fs.de

listings.title: Geleceği Savunmak İçin Birlikteyiz!
listings.description: Geleceği Savunmak İçin Birlikteyiz!   Özgün, cesur ve yenilikçi ROKETSAN, fark yaratan yerli ve milli ürünleriyle, küresel hedeflerine doğru ilerlemeye ve ülkemizin gururu olmaya devam ediyor. Türkiye’nin savunma gücüne yön veren projelerde yer alan ekibimizin bir parçası olarak, kariyer yolculuğunuzda fark yaratma fırsatı yakalayabilirsiniz.   Program Hakkında Savunma Sanayii Başkanlığı, Savunma Sanayii Akademi koordinasyonunda,  Milli Yetkinlik Hamlesi  doğrultusunda düzenlenen  Teknoloji ve Yetkinlik Buluşmaları  programının beşinci yurt dışı etkinliği,  18–19 Nisan 2026  tarihlerinde  Almanya’nın Berlin ve Hamburg  şehirlerinde gerçekleştirilmektedir.   ﻿Bu program, yurt dışında yaşayan  Türk vatandaşı veya mavi kart sahibi mühendisler, araştırmacılar ve öğrenciler  için savunma sanayii ekosistemini yakından tanıma ve sektördeki gelişmeleri doğrudan deneyimleme fırsatı sunmaktadır.   Amaç Savunma sanayii firmaları ile potansiyel adaylar arasında  doğrudan etkileşim ve ön mülakat  ortamı oluşturmak, Savunma Kariyer Platformu üzerinden firmaların ilanlarına dijital başvuru imkânı sağlamak, Türk vatandaşı veya mavi kart sahibi yeteneklerimizin  dijital ortamda yönlendirilebilir  hale gelmesini sağlamak, Savunma sanayiinde  insan kaynağı kapasitesini güçlendirmek  ve bilgi paylaşımını artırmak.   Kimler Başvurabilir? Yurt dışında eğitimine devam eden veya çalışan  Türk vatandaşı veya mavi kart sahibi mühendisler ve öğrenciler , Savunma teknolojileri, yazılım, yapay zekâ, otonomi, sistem entegrasyonu, üretim, AR-GE vb. alanlarda yetkinlik sahibi adaylar veya bu alanlarda öğrenimine devam edenler, Savunma sanayiinde kariyer hedefleyen öğrenci ve profesyoneller.   Katılım Size Ne Sağlar? Etkinlik süresince firmalarla  yüz yüze ön görüşme ve mülakat imkânı , Etkinlik boyunca firmalara  dijital başvuru ve etkinlik sonrası takip kolaylığı , Savunma sanayii ekosistemindeki güncel projeleri, teknolojik öncelikleri ve yetkinlik alanlarını ilk elden öğrenme fırsatı, Milli Yetkinlik Hamlesi  faaliyetlerinden haberdar olma ve vizyonuna katkı sağlama imkânı.   Başvuru Süreci Bu ilana yapılan başvurular,  Teknoloji ve Yetkinlik Buluşmaları  doğrultusunda *ROKETSAN işe alım süreçleri kapsamında değerlendirilecektir. Başvuru yapan adaylar, etkinlik süresince ROKETSAN firma temsilcileriyle   ön görüşme yapma fırsatı  elde edecektir.   Etkinlik Tarihleri ve Yerleri ·        18 Nisan 2026– Berlin, Almanya ·        19 Nisan 2026 – Hamburg, Almanya   Teknolojiyi Üreten, Geleceği Savunan İnsanlar İçin Bir Araya Geliyoruz.   Berlin ve Hamburg’ta buluşalım.   Yarın İçin Yüksel!

listings.title: MKE PATİKA YAZ STAJI: Kıvılcıma Dönüşme Yolculuğu
listings.description: Savunma Sanayii’nin köklü gücü, senin enerjinle buluşuyor! Türkiye’nin yerli ve milli gücü MKE olarak; teorik bilgilerini sahada çeliğe, baruta ve teknolojiye dönüştürecek geleceğin MKE’lisini arıyoruz. Sadece bir staj değil, Türkiye’nin savunma vizyonuna tanıklık edeceğin bir deneyime hazır mısın? 🎯 Kimleri Arıyoruz? Türkiye Cumhuriyeti Vatandaşı isen, Başvuru tarihi itibariyle üniversitelerin aşağıdaki lisans programlarında 3. veya 4. sınıf öğrenimine devam ediyorsan, (Yapılacak stajın zorunlu olduğunun belgelendirilmesi gerekmektedir) 2,70 (4’lük sistemde) ve üstü not ortalamasına sahipsen, Zorunlu staj kapsamında (20, 30 veya 40 iş günü) disiplinli bir tempoya hazırsan, Milli teknolojilere meraklı, çözüm odaklıysan bu staj tam sana göre! 🏆️ Programa hangi bölümler başvurabilir? Makine Mühendisliği Elektrik-Elektronik Mühendisliği / Elektrik ve Elektronik Mühendisliği Mekatronik Mühendisliği Haberleşme Mühendisliği Havacılık ve Uzay Mühendisliği Uçak Mühendisliği Uzay Mühendisliği Bilgisayar Mühendisliği Yazılım Mühendisliği Yapay Zeka ve Veri Mühendisliği İmalat Mühendisliği Metalürji ve Malzeme Mühendisliği / Malzeme Mühendisliği Kimya Mühendisliği Fizik Mühendisliği Endüstri Mühendisliği Kontrol ve Otomasyon Mühendisliği / Kontrol Mühendisliği Endüstriyel Tasarım Mühendisliği Nükleer Enerji Mühendisliği Çevre Mühendisliği İnşaat Mühendisliği Enerji Sistemleri Mühendisliği Kimya Fizik Başvururken Gerekli Olan Belgeler Nelerdir? Onaylı Not Belgesi (transkript) – (PDF formatında ve okul tarafından onaylı) Vesikalık Fotoğraf Nüfus Cüzdanı Fotokopisi Adli Sicil Kaydı Üniversiteye yerleşilen ÖSYM başarı sıralamasını ibraz eden belge (PDF formatında olmalı) Zorunlu Staj Belgesi (okuldan onaylı olmalıdır) Şehit ve Gazi Çocuğu Belgesi-PDF formatında ve onaylı olmalıdır. (Şehit ve Gazi çocuğu olanlar için yüklenecek) Tüm belgeleri eksiksiz ve doğru olarak yüklediğinden emin olmalısın, aksi takdirde başvurun değerlendirmeye alınmayacaktır. Başvuru Tarihleri : 26.03.2026 – 30.04.2026 Staj Başlangıç Tarihi: 06.07.2026 Staj Lokasyonlarımız: Ankara, Kırıkkale, Çankırı Herhangi bir sorun olması halinde gencyetenek@mke.gov.tr mail adresinden bize ulaşabilirsin. Bu heyecan verici yolculuğa sen de katılmak istiyorsan, hemen başvur! ⭐

listings.title: İş Geliştirme Uzman Yardımcısı
listings.description: GENEL NİTELİKLER VE İŞ TANIMI 1964 yılında Beyoğlu Fitaş Pasajı’nda 12 metrekarelik bir dükkanda başlayan maceramıza, Türkiye’nin 27 ilinde 1.400’ü aşkın çalışanımız ve 90.000 m²’nin üzerinde satış alanına sahip yaklaşık 120 mağazamızda devam ediyoruz. Sizi de, yaratıcı ve müşterilerinin beklentilerini anlayan güçlü ekibimizin bir parçası olmaya davet ediyoruz. Mudo ekibi olarak, Mudo Concept-İş Geliştirme biriminde görevlendirilmek üzere İş Geliştirme Uzman Yardımcısı arıyoruz. Üniversitelerin Endüstri Mühendisliği, İstatistik, Ekonometri vb. bölümlerinden mezun İş geliştirme alanında en az 6 ay deneyimli AXATA, SAP, OBASE yazılımlarını kullanabilen MS Office programlarına ve finansal tablo veri analizine hakim Finansal verileri açık bir şekilde ifade edebilecek sözlü ve yazılı iletişim becerisine sahip İŞ TANIMI Mudo Concept satış – gider bütçelerini hazırlamak ve periyodik olarak performans ölçmek Rutin işleyişteki dönemsel ve aylık raporların üretilmesini sağlamak ve yeni raporlar geliştirmek Mudo Concept mevcut prosedürlerin kontrolünü sağlamak, yeni prosedürler oluşturmak ve uygulamaya almak Kalite sistemini korumak ve geliştirmek için çalışmalar yürütmek LinkedIn üzerinden elektronik olarak ileteceğiniz kişisel verileriniz, Mudo Satış Mağazaları A.Ş. tarafından, çalışan adayı / stajyer / öğrenci seçme ve yerleştirme süreçlerinin yürütülmesi amacı başta olmak üzere, 7 Nisan 2016 tarihli Resmî Gazete’de yayımlanan 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu kapsamında, veri sorumlusu sıfatıyla işlenecektir. Detaylı bilgiye internet sitemizde yer alan (https://www.mudo.com.tr/genel-aydinlatma-metni ) Aydınlatma Metni içerisindeki “Çalışan Adayı” ve “Stajyer Adayı’’ alt başlıklarından ulaşabilirsiniz. If you want more information about AXIS Internship Program and Life @ AXA, you can visit AXA Türkiye Career website and follow@axa.kariyer Instagram account. Hemen Başvur Who Can Apply? - 2nd, 3rd or 4th grade student of an undergraduate program or a student of a graduate program at reputable universities - Able to work minimum of 3 days per week - Must have valid work permit in Turkey - Living and studying in İstanbul - Fluent in English - Strong analytical skills - Strong interpersonal skills - Individuals who are willing to learn and ready to realize their potential! What is in it for me ? A real business experience in a global company To have oppurtunity to work with managers and learn the business & build functional knowledge Involvement in various projects Orientation and onboarding program Personalized learning experience, coaching & feedback, networking opportunities and community events Presentation to Management Committee at the end of program and Graduation Ceremony Application Process DETAYLAR What is AXIS (AXA Intern Story) Program? Applying Period: From April 1 to April 30, 2026 *Applications from candidates who answer all questions in the application form clearly and completely will be given priority in the evaluation process. Would you like to learn more about AXA? AXA Group As one of the world’s leading insurance companies, AXA serves 93 million customers with more than 145,000 employees in 50 countries. With its mission of acting for human progress by protecting what matters, its people strategy, “Care & Dare”, ensures that what is valuable to employees, customers, and society is protected with an empathetic approach; by fostering innovation, courage, and a development-oriented mindset. By evolving from a claim payer into a true customer partner, AXA helps people see the future with confidence, not risk; continuously advancing its technologies with a commitment to shaping the future of insurance, fighting climate change, improving access to healthcare services, supporting economic development, and contributing to the production of scientific knowledge. listings.title: TalenTree Gelişim Yolculuğu
listings.description: Toptalent.co | TalenTree Gelişim Yolculuğu - Kastamonu Entegre İş İlanları Yetenek Programları Etkinlikler Sertifikalar Testler Awards İşveren İşveren Girişi Ücretsiz İş İlanı Ver İşe Alım Çözümleri Değerlendirme ve İşe Alım Testleri İK Platformu Bize Ulaşın | Ücretsiz Üye Ol Üye Girişi Üye Ol Üye Girişi TalenTree Gelişim Yolculuğu Sen de “Yeteneğim Dünyayı Sarsın!” diyerek Kastamonu Entegre’yi daha yakından tanıyacağın bir yolculuğa çıkmaya hazır mısın? Kastamonu Entegre 2026 TalenTree Gelişim Yolculuğu seni bekliyor! Hemen Başvur Kastamonu Entegre TalenTree ile Gelişim Yolculuğuna Çıkmaya Hazır Mısın? Genç yeteneklerin enerji ve potansiyellerini Kastamonu Entegre’nin deneyimi ile bir araya getiren TalenTree, kendini ve potansiyelini keşfetmeni, gerçek iş projelerinden yeni yetkinlikler kazanmanı ve benzersiz bir iş ağı kurma fırsatı sunarak kariyerinde eşsiz bir deneyim kazanmanı sağlar. Sürdürülebilir başarı elde etmen amacıyla eğitim ve deneyim fırsatları sunarak kariyerine yön verecek bir gelişim yolculuğuna çıkmak istiyorsan hemen Kastamonu Entegre TalenTree 2026 programına başvur, ilham verici bir deneyimin parçası ol! TALENTREE 2026 GELİŞİM YOLCULUĞU'NDA SENİ NELER BEKLİYOR? İnovasyona Açık, Global Bir Yapı Çeşitli webinarlar, eğitimler, lider buluşmaları ile dolu dolu bir programda, mentorünle yürüteceğin ve fark yaratacağın çevik bir projenin içerisinde yer alma fırsatı Deneyimli Bir Ekipte Mentor Desteği Kastamonu Entegre’nin üst düzey yöneticileriyle bir araya gelerek, inovasyona açık, geleceğe yatırım yapan bir iş ortamını deneyimleme fırsatı Program Sonrası Part Time İş Fırsatı Merkez ofis veya 6 farklı lokasyondan birini seçerek program sonrası uzun dönem staj, part time iş fırsatı kazanma ve hibrit çalışma modelini deneyimleme imkanı PROGRAM SÜRECİ DETAYLAR TalenTree 2026 Gelişim Yolculuğu nedir? TalenTree Gelişim Yolculuğu, Kastamonu Entegre'de pratik çalışma hayatını deneyimleyeceğin, gelecekteki kariyerine hazırlanman için yetkinliklerini geliştirebileceğin bir programdır. TalenTree Gelişim Yolculuğu’na ilk adımını atman için: - Üniversite 2. veya 3. sınıfta olman, - İngilizcenin iyi olması, - Öğrenmeye ve kişisel gelişimine katkı sunmaya açık, takım çalışmasına yatkın olman yeterli! TalenTree’de seni neler bekliyor? - İstanbul Merkez Ofis, Adana, Balıkesir, Gebze, Kastamonu ve Samsun lokasyonlarından birini seçme imkanı - Mentorun ile yürüteceğin, yeteneklerin ve bilgi birikimin doğrultusunda fark yaratacağın çevik bir projenin içerisinde yer alma - Çeşitli webinarlar, eğitimler, lider buluşmaları ile dolu dolu bir program - Kastamonu Entegre’nin global lokasyonlarındaki üst düzey yöneticilerinden deneyim paylaşımları - İnovasyona açık, geleceğe yatırım yapan bir çalışma ortamı Önemli tarihler nelerdir? listings.title: Junior Brand Manager (Content & Community) – International Opportunity
listings.description: Toptalent.co | Junior Brand Manager (Content & Community) – International Opportunity - Atelier Ethos İK Danışmanlığı İş İlanları Yetenek Programları Etkinlikler Sertifikalar Testler Awards İşveren İşveren Girişi Ücretsiz İş İlanı Ver İşe Alım Çözümleri Değerlendirme ve İşe Alım Testleri İK Platformu Bize Ulaşın | Ücretsiz Üye Ol Üye Girişi Üye Ol Üye Girişi Toptalent.co İş İlanları Junior Brand Manager (Content & Community) – International Opportunity Ücretsiz İş İlanı Ver Junior Brand Manager (Content & Community) – International Opportunity Son 22 Gün Atelier Ethos İK Danışmanlığı Son 22 Gün Şimdi Başvur Departman • Kurumsal İletişim Lokasyon Tüm Türkiye Kimler Başvurabilir? Şimdi Başvur Amsterdam merkezli, eğitim ve danışmanlık alanında faaliyet gösteren uluslararası partnerimiz için, markanın dijital yüzünü temsil edecek bir Junior Brand Manager arıyoruz. Bu rol, klasik bir sosyal medya yönetimi pozisyonu değildir. Aradığımız kişi, markanın içeriklerini doğru şekilde konumlandıracak, iletişimini üstlenecek ve zamanla markanın görünür yüzlerinden biri haline gelecektir. 🎯 Rolün Kapsamı Var olan içerikleri (video, yazı, framework vb.) dijital platformlarda konumlandırmak LinkedIn, YouTube ve benzeri kanallarda içerik iletişimini yürütmek Eğitim ve iş dünyası profesyonelleri ile etkileşim kurmak İçerik üretim süreçlerine katkı sağlamak (özellikle video/konuşma bazlı içerikler) Marka bilinirliği ve büyüme süreçlerine aktif destek vermek 👤 Aranan Profil İngilizce iletişim kurabilen (min. B1/B2) Kamera karşısında rahat veya bu konuda gelişime açık İletişimi güçlü, Networking yapmaya istekli Girişimci mindset’e sahip (hazır yapıdan çok, birlikte büyüme süreci) Eğitim, kişisel gelişim veya edtech alanlarına ilgi duyan ⭐️ Sunduğumuz Fırsat Uluslararası bir markayla doğrudan çalışma fırsatı Performans bazlı büyüme ve sorumluluk artışı Esnek ve remote çalışma Uzun vadede global rol alma ve Avrupa ile çalışma imkanı Kişisel marka geliştirme (içerik üretimi & görünürlük) 👉 “Rol başlangıçta part-time (ayda yaklaşık 2 gün) olarak başlayacak olup, performansa bağlı olarak kapsamı genişletilecektir.” 💡 Kimler için uygun? Kendi kariyerinde uluslararası bir kapı açmak isteyen İçerik üretimi ve görünürlük tarafında gelişmek isteyen Sadece “yapılan işi yürütmek” değil, büyümenin parçası olmak isteyen 📩 Başvuru Başvurularınızı paylaşırken: Daha önce ürettiğiniz içerik örneklerini (varsa) Kendinizi kısaca anlatan bir notu eklemenizi rica ederiz. listings.title: MasterClass Dijital Gelişim Programı
listings.description: Toptalent.co | MasterClass Dijital Gelişim Programı - Türkiye İş Bankası İş İlanları Yetenek Programları Etkinlikler Sertifikalar Testler Awards İşveren İşveren Girişi Ücretsiz İş İlanı Ver İşe Alım Çözümleri Değerlendirme ve İşe Alım Testleri İK Platformu Bize Ulaşın | Ücretsiz Üye Ol Üye Girişi Üye Ol Üye Girişi İş İlanları Yetenek Programları Etkinlikler Sertifika Programları Testler Awards İşveren İngilizce Seviye Testi YENİ Kişisel Gelişim Programı CV Hazırlama Programı Ücretsiz İş İlanı Ver Ücretsiz CV Oluştur Toptalent.co İş İlanları MasterClass Dijital Gelişim Programı İş İlanları Ücretsiz İş İlanı Ver MasterClass Dijital Gelişim Programı Son 26 Gün Türkiye İş Bankası Son 26 Gün Şimdi Başvur Departman • Genel Başvuru Lokasyon İstanbul Avrupa Kimler Başvurabilir? Şimdi Başvur Türkiye İş Bankası MasterClass Dijital Gelişim Programı; eğitim, seminer ve proje deneyimiyle kendini profesyonel hayata hazırlayacağın ve Türkiye İş Bankası’nı yakından tanıyacağın 20 iş günü süreli online gelişim programıdır. Program Tanımı MasterClass Dijital Gelişim Programı, 20 iş günü süresince Genel Müdürlük ile Bilgi Teknolojileri bölümlerinde araştırma projesi geliştirme fırsatı bulacağın gelişim programıdır. Program boyunca proje geliştireceğin alanda çalışan ekiplerle görüşme imkanı bulacak, Türkiye İş Bankası'nı yakından tanıyacak ve çeşitli online eğitim içeriklerini tamamlayacaksın. Değerlendirme Aşamaları Bankamız gelişim programına başvuruları değerlendirmemizin ardından, başvuru koşullarını sağlayan ve değerlendirmesi olumlu olan adaylara aşağıdaki sıralama ile seçim araçlarımız iletilecektir. Bir sonraki aşamaya devam edebilmen için davet edildiğin aşamada başarılı olmalısın. 1. Genel Yetenek Sınavı 2. AI Mülakat 3. Online Mülakat Başvuru Koşulları Uyruk: Türkiye Cumhuriyeti vatandaşı olmak. Yaş: Başvuru tarihi itibarıyla 27 yaşını doldurmamış olmak. Sınıf: 3. ya da 4. sınıf lisans veya yüksek lisans öğrencisi olmak ve program boyunca öğrenciliği devam ediyor olmak. Bölüm: Bilgi Teknolojileri için Mühendislik, Matematik, Yönetim Bilişim Sistemleri ve İstatistik bölümlerinde öğrenci olmak. Genel Müdürlük için bölüm koşulu bulunmamaktadır. Yabancı Dil: İyi seviyede İngilizce biliyor olmak. Sigorta: Programın sigorta zorunluluğu bulunmamaktadır. Katılım: Türkiye İş Bankası'nın staj ve gelişim programlarına daha önce katılmış adayların, süreçte adil bir değerlendirme ortamının korunması amacıyla başvuruları olumlu değerlendirilmemektedir. Değerlendirme sürecine dahil olup olumlu sonuçlanmayan adaylar başvuru koşullarını sağlamaları halinde tekrar başvurabilirler. Program Takvimi Son Başvuru Tarihi – 20 Mayıs Seçim Aşamaları – 1 Haziran – 24 Temmuz Program Teklifleri – 30 Temmuz – 4 Ağustos Program Başlangıcı – 17 Ağustos Program Bitişi – 11 Eylül Diğer Bilgiler Program Başvuru Süreci Gelişim programımızın başvuru koşullarından biri, üniversitelerin yüksek lisans veya lisans programlarında 3. ya da 4. sınıf öğrencisi olmaktır. Mezun adaylarımız işe alım süreçlerimize dahil olabileceği için staj yerine işe alım ilanlarımıza başvurabilirler. Başvuruları değerlendirmemizin ardından, başvuru koşullarını sağlayan ve değerlendirmesi olumlu olan adaylara seçim araçlarımız iletilecektir. Bir sonraki aşamaya devam edebilmen için davet edildiğin aşamada başarılı olmalısın. Seçim aşamalarımızdan birisi olan mülakat sürecimizde, İK profesyonelleriyle görüşülerek proje gerçekleştireceğin bölüme yönlendirileceksin. O aşamaya kadar seçim süreçleri Bilgi Teknolojileri ve Genel Müdürlük bölümleri için de ortaktır. Program Neler Sunuyor MasterClass Dijital Gelişim Programı, tamamın online olarak yürütülecek, 20 iş günü süresince profesyonel hayatı deneyimlediğin gelişim programımızdır. ➜ Gelişim Fırsatı: Program süresince İş Bankası’nda yeni nesil proje yönetim yaklaşımları ile proje gerçekleştireceksin. ➜ Profesyonel Hayata Hazırlık: Mesleki ve kişisel gelişim konularında eğitim, seminer ve vaka çalışmalarına katılacak; program süresince alanına yöneli

listings.title: İnsansız Hava Araçları Alt Sistemleri Proje Mühendisi
listings.description: ASELSAN Radar ve Elektronik Harp Sistemleri (REHİS) Sektör Başkanlığı bünyesinde İstanbul yerleşkesindeki faaliyetlerimizde bize güç katacak; üniversitelerin Elektrik-Elektronik, Makine, Uçak, Havacılık ve Uzay Mühendisliği bölümlerinden mezun İnsansız Hava Araçları Alt Sistemleri Proje Mühendisi çalışma arkadaşları arıyoruz. BU POZİSYONDA EN ÖNEM VERDİĞİMİZ YETKİNLİKLER VE DENEYİMLER Proje yönetimi ve koordinasyonu konusunda deneyimli, Müşteri ile teknik ve operasyonel konularda etkin iletişim kurabilecek, Saha çalışmalarına yatkın ve aktif rol alabilecek, İstanbul/Hadımköy ve Çorlu arasında seyahat engeli bulunmayan, Dokümantasyon ve teknik raporlama konusunda yetkin, MS Office ve tercihen proje yönetim araçlarına hâkim, Tercihen Savunma, havacılık veya ileri teknoloji projelerinde deneyimli, Tercihen uçak üzeri elektronik sistemler, donanım bileşenleri ve test süreçleri hakkında bilgi sahibi, Tercihen saha testleri, entegrasyon ve devreye alma süreçlerinde deneyimli. SENDEN NELER BEKLİYORUZ? Proje ilerlemelerini takip etmek, düzenli teknik/idari raporlama yapmak, dokümantasyonlarını hazırlamak, güncel tutmak, Ankara, İstanbul/Hadımköy ve Çorlu lokasyonları arasında teknik ve operasyonel süreçleri yönetmek, Proje paydaşları ve müşteri ile etkin iletişim kurmak, koordinasyonu sağlamak, Müşteri ile teknik ve idari süreçlerde arayüz görevi üstlenmek, Saha faaliyetlerini planlamak, organize etmek ve sahada aktif rol almak, Saha problemlerine hızlı müdahale etmek, kök neden analizi yaparak proje paydaşları ile birlikte çözümler üretmek, Ekipler arası koordinasyonunu sağlanmak, iş takibini yürütmek. İşe alım kriterlerimizi ASELSAN internet sayfamızda Kariyer Sekmesinde bulunan İşe Alım Sürecimiz alanından inceleyerek iş başvuru formumuzu doldur. ASELSAN ailesinin bir parçası olarak yerli ve milli projelerdeki başarımızda senin de imzan olsun. Biz Kimiz? Alanında dünyanın en iyi ürünlerini yapma, oyun değiştirici teknolojiler geliştirme ve ihracat odaklı büyüme hedeflerimizle ülkemize ve dünyanın dört bir yanındaki kullanıcılarımıza değer katan küresel bir markayız. listings.title: Marketing Management Trainee
listings.description: What is the Summary of This Position? This role is responsible for managing field activities and ensuring the achievement of product promotion and sales targets. What You'll Be Doing? Monitoring market dynamics, consumer behavior, and competitive activity by leveraging digital data sources, market research platforms, and analytics tools, and preparing comprehensive analyses, Managing assigned projects end-to-end by using digital project management systems, tracking progress, and ensuring successful and timely completion, Supporting the achievement of promotional and sales targets for responsible products during field assignments by integrating digital and physical channel strategies, measuring performance, and providing improvement recommendations, Supporting digital marketing activities, including content management, campaign analytics, and CRM practices, to enhance brand visibility and customer engagement, Identifying process improvement opportunities aligned with the company’s digitalization vision, supporting the effective adoption of new digital tools in both field and office environments, and collaborating with relevant teams for successful implementation. Which Profile Are We Looking For? Bachelor’s degree in related field, New graduated or max. 1 year of experience in Sales & Marketing, Proficiency in MS Office applications, Excellent command of written and spoken English, Required to have a Class B driver’s license and be an active driver. Nobel’s proven excellence in the global pharmaceutical sector is driven by the dedication and expertise of our people. Since 1954, we have grown from our roots in Türkiye into a global pharmaceutical company, thanks to the dedication and expertise of nearly 5,000 colleagues. We operate 5 R&D and production hubs across Türkiye, Kazakhstan, and Uzbekistan, and our presence spans 24 countries with dedicated local teams. Our multicultural and multinational colleagues embody our global presence, ensuring that our products reach patients in more than 50 countries. What unites us is our mission: Health for All, Access for All. Every day, we work with passion to improve the quality of human life because at Nobel, every contribution makes a difference. Show more Show less

listings.title: Onkoloji PAH Marketing Intern
listings.description: At Johnson & Johnson, we believe health is everything. Our strength in healthcare innovation empowers us to build a world where complex diseases are prevented, treated, and cured, where treatments are smarter and less invasive, and solutions are personal. Through our expertise in Innovative Medicine and MedTech, we are uniquely positioned to innovate across the full spectrum of healthcare solutions today to deliver the breakthroughs of tomorrow, and profoundly impact health for humanity. Learn more at jnj.com. As guided by Our Credo, Johnson & Johnson is responsible to our employees who work with us throughout the world. We provide an inclusive work environment where each person is considered as an individual. At Johnson & Johnson, we respect the diversity and dignity of our employees and recognize their merit. Job Function Career Programs Job Sub Function Non-LDP Intern/Co-Op Job Category Career Program All Job Posting Locations: Istanbul, Turkey Job Description Caring for the world, one person at a time has inspired and united the people of Johnson & Johnson for over 125 years. We embrace research and science -- bringing innovative ideas, products and services to advance the health and well-being of people. Employees of the Johnson & Johnson Family of Companies work with partners in health care to touch the lives of over a billion people every day, throughout the world. Thriving on a diverse company culture, celebrating the uniqueness of our employees and committed to inclusion. Proud to be an equal opportunity employer. And our culture is interconnected by the shared values of Our Credo. It’s a culture that celebrates diversity and diverse perspectives. It helps employees achieve an effective mix between work and home life and supports their efforts to have a positive impact on their communities. For our friends who dream of a career in many different fields, we are excited to announce that we have officially started the internship recruitment process in various fields within Johnson and Johnson Turkey. Remember; working with Johnson & Johnson can change everything. Including YOU. For more than 130 years, diversity, equity & inclusion (DEI) have been part of our cultural fabric at Johnson & Johnson and woven into how we do business every day. Our commitment to respect the dignity and diversity of all is embedded in our Credo. We know that the success of our business depends on having the best talent in a workforce that reflects the diverse markets we serve around the world and an inclusive culture that values different perspectives and life experiences. We are excited to announce that Janssen Turkey is hiring 14 Interns across different departments. That is why we in Turkey are working to create an inclusive environment where diverse backgrounds, perspectives and experiences are valued and each and every one of our people feels that they belong and can reach their potential. No matter who they are. Main Tasks Will be responsible for supporting the marketing team in Turkey in: monitoring of market dynamics, trends, market share in close collaboration with brand teams & business intelligence, monitor budget reports in close collaboration with brand teams and finance, preparing reports from internal & external databases & presentations & documents based on guidance provided by product managers, preparing promotional materials and conducting agency relations. Should work with either local or global marketing teams and attend necessary meetings (e.g. CVT meetings) and take notes. Qualifications Senior University student (3rd or 4th Grade, preferably 4th Grade) – studying engineering, business administration, scientific sciences and other related areas Experience in marketing and pharma industry is a plus. Familiarity with Microsoft applications (Excel, Powerpoint, Teams) and Zoom Strong communication skills with the ability to discuss any issues with a wide variety of individuals and groups Creative problem solving and strong communication skills Ready to fit for a company which has the agile way of working; which empowers employees to stay a step a head in life and business Motivated to work in marketing and/or project management and in pharma industry. Fluent in English Able to work at least 3 days/week for at least 12 months period #JnJEMEAStudentCareers #JnJEMEAPharmaceuticals #JNJEMEAUndergraduate #JNJIEMEAInternship Required Skills Preferred Skills: Show more Show less

listings.title: Management Trainee (Sales) - Ankara
listings.description: About the job Founded in 1987, Hayat operates in the fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) sector, serving millions of consumers globally with 16 powerful brands. Hayat’s portfolio includes Molfix and Bebem Natural in baby care; Molped in feminine care; Joly , Evony , and Goodcare in personal healthcare; Bingo , Gleen , Test , and Has in home care; Papia , Familia , Teno , and Focus in tissue paper; and Sholk in pet care. As the 4th largest branded diaper manufacturer in the world and the leading tissue producer in the Middle East, Eastern Europe, and Africa, Hayat employs over 10.000 people across its operations. Hayat operates 21 production facilities in 8 countries , including Turkey, Egypt, Iran, Algeria, Russia, Nigeria, Pakistan, and Vietnam, and manages sales and distribution companies in Morocco, Bulgaria, Kenya, Thailand, and Malaysia. With its global operations structured under three main regions Eurasia & Americas, Middle East & Africa, and Asia Pacific Hayat reaches over 100 countries across 5 continents, bringing its brands into millions of homes worldwide. We are currently seeking a talented “Management Trainee” to join our dynamic “Sales” team based in “ TR, Ankara ”. If you want to be part of a diverse and vibrant community where your ideas can shape the future of the FMCG industry and your contributions can create a lasting global impact, then Hayat is waiting for you! Why should you apply for H Generation Management Trainee Program? With our H Generation Management Trainee Program, we target to help the selected individuals enrich their talent by offering well-designed training plans, mentorship and rotation programs across departments. These programs are designed to be supported with regular feedback sessions. You can apply for H Generation MT Program, if you meet requirements below: • 4th grade, fresh graduate or master’s student • Have excellent verbal and written communication skills • Fluent in English • Eager to learn in a global environment • Interested in FMCG field and Supply Chain function You can see our next process steps below: Application / Online Assessment Process / Interview / Job Offer As Hayat, we know that success will come as we take action in our journey that starts anew every day. That's why we don't stop, we don't wait, we Make Our Move. Make Your Move today, apply for this opportunity and join us. Looking forward to meeting you! What We Offer You Private Health Insurance Employee Shuttle Service Meal Voucher / Canteen Monthly Employee Support Package (Assortment of Hayat Products or Food Package) Monthly Internet Allowence Baby Diaper Support (For Children Up to) and Diaper Support for 1st Degree Relatives of Employees) 3 Days of Administrative Paid Leave Per Year Heating and Eid Allowance Once a Year Award & Recognition Programs FLEX: Flexible Benefits Program Wezone: Rewards and Recognition Program Seniority Award Support Heltia: Employee Assistance Program At Hayat, we conduct fair and inclusive hiring processes. We do not tolerate prejudice or discrimination based on language, religion, ethnicity, race, or gender. Our recruitment process is solely based on the alignment with the job description, measurable and objective assessments, and competency-based interviews. Get to know us Please visit us at the following addresses for any information you need: https://www.hayat.com/en-tr/ https://www.instagram.com/hayatkimya/ Clarification Text for Employee Candidate : https://www.hayat.com/aydinlatma-metni/aydinlatma-metni.htm Show more Show less

listings.title: HGenius Long-term Intern (After Sales Spare Part)
listings.description: Hyundai Motor Türkiye invites you to become part of one of the world’s leading car manufacturers. Being a member of our international team, you have the chance to form the future of mobility together with experts inside a global company with a unique success story. As a well-organized, flexible and motivated professional, you will master diverse challenges and work in a dynamic environment with a strong customer focus. We love to defy conventions and drive ambitious future plans with responsibility when it comes to mobility, quality and design. For these aims we need the right team and therefore, we need you. At Hyundai, we believe that the success of our organization lies in the passion and diversity of individual members. That is why we also commit to supporting them in their personal development, while offering an inspiring work atmosphere. Join us for creating future mobility. If you want to know more about us, then visit our accounts. Website: https://hyundai-motor.com.tr/tr/ Location: İstanbul, Maltepe 2025 HGenius Long Term Internship Program Ready to start your growth journey with us? We would like to welcome you to our long-term internship program HGenius. What is HGenius? HGenius is a unique internship program designed for university students in their final year, where you can experience real business life in an international environment. What’s in it for you Hands-on work experience in a global automotive company A chance to get to know Korean culture and collaborate in a multicultural workplace Professional and personal development opportunities Exposure to advanced production technologies in the automotive industry A platform to showcase your skills through project assignments What is required to be HGenius? 4th year undergraduate or master’s students from related departments Previous internship experience is a plus Ability to attend the program at least 3 days a week (on-site) Strong communication and analytical skills with advanced English proficiency What do we offer to HGenius? Accommodation & transportation support Priority consideration for full-time positions after graduation Competitive salary Access to personal development and technical training programs via Hyundai Development Academy Responsibilities Create sales invoice, expense and follow up all processes with SAP Support Export & Marketing team on operational works Take part of business and process development projects 👉 Join HGenius and take the first big step in your career journey with Hyundai! listings.title: Bütçe & Raporlama Uzmanı
listings.description: GENEL NİTELİKLER VE İŞ TANIMI 1964 yılında Beyoğlu Fitaş Pasajı’nda 12 metrekarelik bir dükkanda başlayan maceramıza, Türkiye’nin 27 ilinde 1.400’ü aşkın çalışanımız ve 90.000 m²’nin üzerinde satış alanına sahip yaklaşık 120 mağazamızda devam ediyoruz. Sizi de, yaratıcı ve müşterilerinin beklentilerini anlayan güçlü ekibimizin bir parçası olmaya davet ediyoruz. Mudo ekibi olarak, Mecidiyeköy merkezimizde yer alan Mali İşler-Bütçe & Raporlama departmanımız için Bütçe & Raporlama Uzmanı arıyoruz. listings.title: Amcorian Internship Program
listings.description: Back to search results Amcorian Internship Program Location: Izmir, TR, 35620 Department: Operations/Production/Manufacturing Full-time or Part-time: Full-Time Job Type: Intern Shift: On site Accelerate the possible by joining a winning Amcor team that’s transforming the packaging industry and improving lives around the world. At Amcor, we unpack possibility through our innovative and responsible packaging to provide solutions that benefit our customers, our people and our planet. More than 10,000 consumers worldwide encounter our products every second and rely on us for safe access to food, medicine and other goods. We value their trust by making safety our guiding principle. It’s our core value and integral to how we do business. Beyond this core principle, our shared values and behaviors unite us as we work together to elevate customers, shape lives and protect the future. We champion our customers and help them succeed. We play to win – adapting quickly in an everchanging world – and make smart choices to safeguard our business, our communities and the people we serve for generations to come. And we invest in our world-class team, empowering our colleagues to unpack their potential, because we believe when our people grow, so does our business. To learn more about playing for Team Amcor, visit www.amcor.com I LinkedIn I Glassdoor I Facebook I YouTube Qualifications Continuing in an associate degree program or completing the 2nd or 3rd year in bachelor's programs Continuing education in technical departments such as Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Electronical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Industrial Engineering etc., in associate degree programs Internship insurance paid by the university Interested in the packaging industry Fluent in English Preferably able to use Ms Office programs Strong communication skills, open to learning and development Residing in or able to reside in Izmir Job Description Working within the assigned department as part of the internship project and providing support to business processes. What We Offer Global working environment To be part of dynamic Amcor Team Internship training program About Amcor Amcor is the global leader in developing and producing responsible consumer packaging and dispensing solutions across a variety of materials for nutrition, health, beauty and wellness categories. Our global product innovation and sustainability expertise enables us to solve packaging challenges around the world every day, producing a range of flexible packaging, rigid packaging, cartons and closures that are more sustainable, functional and appealing for our customers and their consumers. We are guided by our purpose of elevating customers, shaping lives and protecting the future. Supported by a commitment to safety, over 75,000 people generate $23 billion in annualized sales from operations that span over 400 locations in more than 40 countries. NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC www.amcor.com | LinkedIn | YouTube Amcor is committed to providing a secure and reliable experience for all job seekers. If you are looking to join Amcor, please read this page to help you avoid recruitment scams. Click Here! Show more Show less
